3191050.name: BRAZILIAN DRUG DEALER 3: I OPENED A PORTAL TO HELL IN THE FAVELA TRYING TO REVIVE MIT AIA I NEED TO CLOSE IT
3191050.description:
"Incredible things coming out of Latin America right now"

-Hakita (Creator of Ultrakill) about the game 

"John Brazil/You shot a lot f¨&$ you I don't give a s*$¨/GOTY 2025"

-Vinny (Vinesauce)

"I picked up a lotta cool weapons!!!!"

-Charlie (MoistCr1TiKaL)

"I just impulse bought this game. This is probably the most realistic depiction of Rio de Janeiro I've ever seen in a video game."

-Chance Glasco (Co-Founder of Infinity Ward from Call of Duty)

"BDD3 plays, looks, and sounds like a retro fever dream, complete with loud, ear-piercing music, random sound effects, bizarre textures everywhere you look, and oddly shaped levels based on real-life locations." "I had a blast playing BDD3."

-Zack Zwiezen (Kotaku)

"One of 2025’s best releases"

-Joel Loynds (The Escapist)

"BRAZILIAN DRUG DEALER 3: I OPENED A PORTAL TO HELL IN THE FAVELA TRYING TO REVIVE MIT AIA I NEED TO CLOSE IT is the best boomer shooter of 2025 and I think everyone should play it."

-Civvie

IMPORTANT : THIS GAME WILL CONTINUE RECEIVING NEW UPDATES AND MAPS EVEN AFTER 1.0!!

BRAZILIAN DRUG DEALER 3 is a fast-paced ultraviolent BRAZILIAN old school FPS heavily inspired by the first Quake, and using the same engine as the game (ID TECH2). It is A TRIBUTE TO THE BRAZILIAN MODS OF THE 2000S, THE BRAZILIAN BOOTLEG GAMES OF THE 2000S, BRAZILIAN MUSIC AND THE KING OF BRAZILIAN MUSIC, MIT AIA!

YOU ARE A MIT AIA FAN, A LEGEND OF BRAZILIAN 70S FUNK MUSIC, AND YOU TRIED TO REVIVE HIM IN THE FAVELA WHERE YOU LIVE WITH A PENTAGRAM, THINGS TOOK A BAD TURN AND YOU OPENED A PORTAL TO HELL! ALL THE PEOPLE IN THE STATE OF RIO DE JANEIRO GOT POSSEEESSED! IT'S UP TO YOU TO FIND A WAY TO STOP THE HELL INVASION!

  • Use your quake-ish movement abilities to stay mobile and avoid the relentless attacks of the dead, demons and other BRAZILIAN POSSESSED.

  • ALMOST EVERY WEAPON IN THE GAME IS BATHED IN GOLD AND ALSO THE ROCKET LAUNCHER HAS THE COLORS OF YOUR FAVORITE BRAZILIAN TEAM, FLAFLAMENCO!

  • CRAZY WEAPONS LIKE BERIMBAU, PAYPHONE THAT SHOOTS COCONUTS AND MONEY PAPER AIRPLANE GUN!!

  • A BUNCH OF ENEMIES GOING FROM ARMED DEMONS TO ZOMBIES, BRAZILIAN TRUCK CLOWNS AND EVEN POSSESSED BRAZILIAN SINGERS!

  • 42 STAGES GOING THROUGH THE ENTIRE STATE OF RIO DE JANEIRO, PARTS OF SÃO PAULO, AMAZONIA, SPACE, HELL AND EVEN HEAVEN! SAVE RIO AND SAVE MIT AIA! (28 CAMPAIGN STAGES, 5 HORDE MAPS AND 3 DM MAPS!) (wow what happened! the game had 18 maps in the day early access launched, things change fast, it's double the size lol)

  • LOTS OF SECRET AREAS ON EACH LEVEL!

  • -COOPERATIVE AND DEATHMATCH ON ALL CAMPAIGN MAPS

  • -EAT PASTEL AND DRINK CANE BROTH TO GAIN HEALTH! IT'S SCATTERED ON THE MAPS!

  • REPLAY THE GAME WITH ROCKET JUMPING TO FIND EXCLUSIVE ROCKET JUMP SECRET AREAS! OLD SCHOOL 90S STYLE!

  • ATTENTION : THE GAME WILL STILL RECEIVE CONTENT MONTHLY EVEN AFTER 1.0!
